data.name: WelcomeDashboardSub
data.value: Track your application status and manage your personal information.

data.name: AdmissionsClosed
data.value: Admissions and allocation are currently closed

data.name: AdmissionsClosedSub
data.value: You cannot edit your data or pick preferences at this time. Please watch for university announcements.

data.name: ClosedFromAdminShort
data.value: Preference selection has been closed by the university administration.

data.name: PreferencesIntro
data.value: Available colleges and the maximum number of preferences are set automatically based on your section.

data.name: PreferencesClosedBody
data.value: Preferences cannot be added or modified after admissions are closed by the administration.

data.name: ApplicationFormIntro
data.value: Verification uses your national ID and seat number together. Grades are imported officially from the high school results and cannot be entered manually.

data.name: EditClosedBody
data.value: Application data cannot be edited after admissions are closed by the administration.

data.name: PreferencesMaxHint
data.value: You can choose up to {0} colleges by priority.

data.name: LoadError
data.value: An error occurred while loading data. Please try again.

data.name: MinScoreRequired
data.value: Minimum percentage required to choose this college:

data.name: JsMaxColleges
data.value: You can select at most {0} colleges

data.name: JsAtLeastOne
data.value: Please select at least one college

data.name: VerifiedLinkedMsg
data.value: Your identity has been verified and your official result linked. The data below is official and cannot be edited.

data.name: EmailReadonlyHint
data.value: Email is tied to your account and cannot be edited here.

data.name: NoGradesEnteredHint
data.value: You will not enter any grades. After verification, your official result is fetched automatically and shown read-only.

data.name: AdminDashboardSub
data.value: Manage and monitor the admissions and allocation system

data.name: ImportSub
data.value: Upload the official Excel file and compute percentages on the server

data.name: ManageCollegesSub
data.value: Edit college data, capacity, and minimum required score

data.name: MinScoreHint
data.value: Students whose percentage is below this cannot choose the college.

data.name: VisibleSwitchHint
data.value: When hidden, the college is not shown to students and is excluded from allocation.

data.name: AllowedSectionsHint
data.value: The college is shown only to students in the selected sections. (The Finance college is hidden from students by a special rule regardless of this setting.)

data.name: DeleteWarningHeading
data.value: Warning: this action cannot be undone

data.name: DeleteEraseCollege
data.value: Permanently remove the college from the system.

data.name: DeleteErasePrefs
data.value: Delete all preferences linked to it

data.name: DeleteEraseAllocs
data.value: Delete all allocation results for it

data.name: DeleteAllocNote
data.value: Students accepted into this college will have no result for it. Allocation will NOT run automatically — the admin must run it manually later to redistribute them.

data.name: MustChooseSection
data.value: You must choose at least one section

data.name: AdmissionsOpenDesc
data.value: Students can submit applications and choose preferences

data.name: DeleteOpsNote
data.value: These operations delete operational data only and cannot be undone. They do NOT delete student accounts and profiles, nor the imported official results database. Use them only when starting a new admission cycle.

data.name: DeleteAllocationsDesc
data.value: Deletes allocation results only and resets college cutoffs. Does not delete preferences or profiles.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteAllAllocations
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all allocations?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteAllPreferences
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all preferences?

data.name: UseForNewCycle
data.value: Use this function only to start a new admission cycle

data.name: CollegeResultsSubtitle
data.value: Choose a college to view accepted students ordered from highest to lowest

data.name: NoResultsForCollege
data.value: No results available for this college yet.

data.name: StudentPhoneHint
data.value: Student mobile number (11 digits starting with 01)

data.name: ParentPhoneHint
data.value: Parent mobile number (required) — can be used by up to 3 accounts

data.name: PasswordHint
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters with upper/lowercase letters, a digit and a special character.

data.name: ForgotPasswordSub
data.value: Enter your registered email to receive password reset instructions

data.name: ForgotConfirmBody
data.value: If the email is registered with us, password reset instructions will be sent to it. Please check your inbox and follow the link.

data.name: ResetConfirmBody
data.value: You can now sign in with your new password.

data.name: AccessDeniedSub
data.value: Sorry, you don't have permission to access this page

data.name: AccessDeniedHint
data.value: You may need to sign in with another account or contact the administration for the required permissions.

data.name: ApplicantsSub
data.value: View and manage all applying students

data.name: SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by name, email, or national ID

data.name: RunAllocationPageSub
data.value: Distribute students across colleges based on equivalent percentage and preferences

data.name: AllocationAlgorithmSub
data.value: All students will be sorted by equivalent percentage (highest first), then placed in colleges based on their preferences and available capacity

data.name: Step1Sort
data.value: Sort students by equivalent percentage (highest first)

data.name: Step2Assign
data.value: For each student: try to place them in the first preferred college with available capacity

data.name: Step3Cutoff
data.value: Compute the final cutoff for each college after allocation

data.name: Step4Save
data.value: Save the results and notify students

data.name: ConfirmStartAllocation
data.value: Are you sure you want to start the allocation? This will affect all applications.

data.name: ReviewBeforeRunning
data.value: Make sure to review all applications before running

data.name: AllocationIrreversible
data.value: Allocation cannot be undone after running

data.name: NoAllocationRunYet
data.value: Allocation has not been run yet

data.name: ImportPageSub
data.value: Upload the official Excel file and compute percentages on the server

data.name: ImportFileExists
data.value: An imported results file already exists. You must delete the current data first before uploading a new file.

data.name: ExcelFileHint
data.value: The file contains: seat number, student name, score, and pass/fail status.

data.name: MaxScoreHint
data.value: For the current test file: 700 · For the final file: 320

data.name: ImportBatchHint
data.value: Helps you distinguish batches in the audit log

data.name: AbortOnOverflowHint
data.value: Recommended: if any row's percentage exceeds 100% the whole import is aborted (means MaxScore is wrong)

data.name: ServerComputesHint
data.value: The equivalent percentage is computed on the server automatically. Failing students (failed/absent) are stored as "not eligible" for application — not skipped.

data.name: DeleteOfficialSub
data.value: Dangerous operation — please review carefully before confirming

data.name: DeleteBlockedMsg
data.value: Official results data cannot be deleted because students have been verified using it. You must reset application and allocation data first before deleting the official results.

data.name: NoOfficialToDelete
data.value: No imported results data to delete.

data.name: DeleteOfficialWarn
data.value: {0} record(s) will be permanently deleted from the imported official results database. Students, accounts and colleges will NOT be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: DeleteOfficialConfirmJs
data.value: Final confirmation: delete all imported official results data?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteOfficialBtn
data.value: Confirm deletion of current high-school results

data.name: ResetVerifiedSub
data.value: Detach students from official results to allow deleting them later

data.name: ResetItem1
data.value: Detach {0} verified student(s) from the official records (unlink).

data.name: ResetItem2
data.value: Clear data copied from the official record inside the student profile: national ID, seat number, total, percentage, equivalent percentage.

data.name: ResetItem3
data.value: Delete {0} preference(s) and {1} allocation(s) for these students (they will re-apply).

data.name: ResetItem4
data.value: Block students from preferences and results until they re-verify.

data.name: ResetSafeNote
data.value: The following will NOT be deleted: user accounts, colleges, admin account, or imported official results data.

data.name: ResetIrreversible
data.value: This action cannot be undone. Students will need to re-enter their national ID and seat number to verify again.

data.name: NoLinkedStudents
data.value: No students are linked to official results. No need to reset.

data.name: ConfirmResetJs
data.value: Final confirmation: detach {0} student(s) from official results and delete their preferences and allocations?

data.name: ConfirmResetBtn
data.value: Confirm application and verification data reset

data.name: ErrCodeTaken
data.value: The college code is already used by another college

data.name: MsgCollegeDeleted
data.value: College {0} and all its links were deleted ({1} preference(s), {2} allocation(s)).

data.name: ErrCollegeDeleteFailed
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the college. No changes were applied.

data.name: Acc_StudentPhoneTaken
data.value: This student mobile number is already used by another account.

data.name: Acc_ParentPhoneMaxed
data.value: This parent mobile number has reached the maximum number of accounts (3).

data.name: Acc_AccountLocked
data.value: The account is temporarily locked due to repeated failed sign-in attempts. Try again in 10 minutes.

data.name: Acc_ResetLinkInvalid
data.value: The password reset link is invalid or incomplete.

data.name: Acc_ResetLinkInvalidShort
data.value: The password reset link is invalid.

data.name: Acc_ResetEmailBody
data.value: To reset your password, open the link below:

data.name: Id_DuplicateEmail
data.value: This email is already in use

data.name: Id_PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: Password must contain an uppercase letter

data.name: Id_PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: Password must contain a lowercase letter

data.name: Id_PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Password must contain a special character (e.g. @ or !)

data.name: Id_InvalidToken
data.value: The reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.

data.name: Id_Generic
data.value: Something went wrong, please try again

data.name: St_AlreadyLinkedReadOnly
data.value: Your account is already linked to an official record and cannot be changed.

data.name: St_IdentityLookupError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Try again or contact the administrator.

data.name: St_NationalIdNotFound
data.value: The national ID was not found in the university records.

data.name: St_SeatMismatch
data.value: Seat number does not match the national ID.

data.name: St_SeatNotInOfficial
data.value: Seat number not found in the official results.

data.name: St_NotEligible
data.value: This student is not eligible to apply based on the official result.

data.name: St_SeatLinkedElsewhere
data.value: This seat number is linked to another account. Please contact support.

data.name: St_PhoneInUse
data.value: This phone number is already in use. Please enter a different number or leave it empty.

data.name: St_SaveError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while saving. Try again or contact the administrator.

data.name: St_VerifiedOk
data.value: Your identity was verified and your official result linked successfully.

data.name: St_MustCompleteProfile
data.value: You must complete the application form first!

data.name: St_AlreadyAllocatedNoEdit
data.value: Allocation results have been announced — preferences cannot be edited.

data.name: St_PrefAtLeastOne
data.value: Please select at least one college

data.name: St_PrefMax
data.value: You can select at most {0} colleges for your section

data.name: St_PrefNotAvailableForTrack
data.value: You picked a college not available for your section. Please choose from the available colleges only.

data.name: St_PrefCollegeHidden
data.value: The college {0} is currently hidden and cannot be selected.

data.name: St_PrefBelowMin
data.value: You cannot select {0} because your percentage is below its minimum required score.

data.name: St_PrefSavedOk
data.value: Your preferences have been saved successfully. You can update them before admissions close.

data.name: St_MustChoosePrefs
data.value: You must choose your preferences first!

data.name: St_NoAllocationYet
data.value: No college has been allocated to you yet

data.name: St_DocsUploadDisabled
data.value: Online document upload is disabled. Please bring the original paper documents when visiting the university.

data.name: St_MustCompleteApplicationShort
data.value: You must complete the application form first

data.name: St_MustChoosePrefsShort
data.value: You must choose college preferences first

data.name: St_AllocationNotAnnounced
data.value: Allocation results have not been announced yet

data.name: St_MustUploadDocs
data.value: You must upload the required documents first

data.name: St_AdmissionsClosedSave
data.value: Admissions are currently closed and changes cannot be saved.

data.name: DA_PasswordsMustMatch
data.value: Password and confirmation do not match

data.name: DA_PhoneFormat
data.value: The mobile number must be 11 digits starting with 01

data.name: DA_PasswordMinLen
data.value: The {0} must be at least {2} characters

data.name: DA_PrefAtLeastOne
data.value: Please select at least one college

data.name: AdmissionsScheduleHint
data.value: Set a start and end date for applications. The start must be earlier than the end. Leave both empty to fall back to the manual switch only.

data.name: InvalidAdmissionsSchedule
data.value: The admissions start date must be before the end date

data.name: AdmissionsExpired
data.value: Admissions closed: the scheduled deadline has passed

data.name: AdmissionsClosedManually
data.value: Admissions are currently closed by the university administration

data.name: AdmissionsManualOpenNoSchedule
data.value: Manually open without a configured window

data.name: NotifAdmissionOpen
data.value: Important: Applications are now open for the 2026-2027 academic year. Please complete your application as soon as possible.

data.name: NotifDeadline
data.value: Notice: The application deadline is June 30, 2026. Make sure all required documents are attached.

data.name: NotifPrefsReminder
data.value: Reminder: Don't forget to select your college preferences to complete the allocation process. The available options and their count depend on your section.

data.name: AllocStatusSub
data.value: Track your application and selected preferences

data.name: AcceptedSub
data.value: Congratulations! A college has been assigned to you

data.name: StepPrintCard
data.value: After the result is announced, print the nomination card

data.name: StepAttendUniversity
data.value: Attend the university with the original paper documents to complete the procedures

data.name: EmailNotifyResults
data.value: You will be notified by email when results are announced

data.name: AttendanceInstructionsBody
data.value: Please attend Assiut National University to complete the admission procedures, bringing the original paper documents and the printed nomination card. The attendance date will be announced by the university administration.

data.name: NotNominatedBody
data.value: Unfortunately, you were not nominated to any college in this round of the allocation

data.name: SecondPhaseNotice
data.value: Watch the site for the dates of the second allocation phase

data.name: HomeHeroTitle
data.value: Welcome to the Online Admissions Portal

data.name: HomeHeroSubtitle
data.value: We open the doors of academic excellence at Assiut National University. Join us and be part of a bright future with accredited academic programs and a distinguished faculty.

data.name: FeatureAccredSub
data.value: Our academic programs are locally and internationally accredited, ensuring you a distinguished professional future.

data.name: FeatureFacultySub
data.value: Faculty members with high experience and scientific competence from the best local and international universities.

data.name: FeatureProgramsSub
data.value: A wide range of scientific and humanities disciplines that meet all the needs of the job market.

data.name: CollegeFinAdmin
data.value: Faculty of Financial and Administrative Sciences

data.name: CollegeCompAI
data.value: Faculty of Computers and Artificial Intelligence

data.name: CtaReady
data.value: Are you ready to join us?

data.name: CtaSubtitle
data.value: Register now and start your academic journey at Assiut National University
